name: React component library
prompt: Build a React component library using React, TypeScript, and CSS. The library must include: (1) A set of reusable components including Button, Card, Modal, Dropdown, Table, and Loader. (2) Strict TypeScript interfaces defining inputs (props), callbacks, themes, and size variants. (3) Styling sheets supporting light and dark mode classes. (4) Unit tests for each component using Jest and React Testing Library. (5) An entry-point exporting all modules. Structure into: src/types.ts, src/components/Button/Button.tsx, src/components/Button/Button.css, src/components/Button/Button.test.tsx, src/components/Card/Card.tsx, src/components/Card/Card.css, src/components/Card/Card.test.tsx, src/components/Modal/Modal.tsx, src/components/Modal/Modal.css, src/components/Modal/Modal.test.tsx, src/components/Dropdown/Dropdown.tsx, src/components/Dropdown/Dropdown.css, src/components/Dropdown/Dropdown.test.tsx, src/components/Table/Table.tsx, src/components/Table/Table.css, src/components/Table/Table.test.tsx, src/index.ts, and package.json.
